projectDescription: A macOS app that extends Finder, QuickLook, and Spotlight to display thumbnails, previews, and metadata for a wide range of non-native video and audio file formats.
keyFeatures: Finder thumbnails and cover art for MKV, WebM, AVI, FLV, WMV, and many other non-native video containers
QuickLook preview support for non-native video file types
Spotlight metadata indexing (title, artist, duration, resolution, codec, etc.) for non-native media files
Support for non-native video codecs: VP6, VP8, VP9, AV1, VVC/H.266, Theora, Sorenson, Cinepak, Indeo, and more
Support for non-native audio codecs: Vorbis, WMA, WavPak, ATRAC, and others
AVFoundation Media Extensions for native OS-level integration
HDR tone mapping via Metal GPU pipeline
Automatic cache reset and Spotlight reindexing on app update
publicApiSurface: FormatReader (MEFormatReader — loads file info, metadata, and track readers via AVFoundation MediaExtension)
VideoDecoder (MEVideoDecoder — decodes non-native video codecs via FFmpeg)
resetCache() — clears the QuickLook thumbnail cache
resetSpotlight() — triggers Spotlight reindexing for the mdimporter
